commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://yanxi-validation-788668107894/manifests/stage4/clean-model-dir.yaml /tmp/clean-model-dir.yaml --region us-east-2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete job model-prefetch -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete deploy sglang-baseline -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete svc sglang-baseline -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete job clean-model-dir -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n yanxi-validation -l job-name=clean-model-dir --tail=40 2>&1'
